chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI F.R.A. No.30 to 38 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ Hearing of case/priority 1.For hg of CMA No.6668/23 2.For hg of main case 13.08.2024. Mr. Umair, advocate holding brief for Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Muhammad Furqan Qureshi, advocate for respondent No. 1. Learned counsel for respondent No. 1 submits that these appeals have become infructuous, as the demised premises, in compliance of execution application, has been handed over to respondent No. 1. This fact has been confirmed by learned counsel of the appellant and, therefore, he does not press these FRAs, which are accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE HANIF
